dialogos.texto_en: Wow...!\nIt's suddenly a sudden development!
This is QUITE an unexpected turn of events!
Quiet.\nWe might get caught.
It's a good thing I turned off the sound on my phone.\nWe were about to get caught.
By the way, a night walk, for just those two?\nNot bad, Futaro-kun.
It's impressive that Fu-kun remembered\nthe Umikaji Terrace event.\nI wouldn't have thought that of him.
Futaro has grown too.
For sure, for sure.\nMaybe he's not the same big bro\nhe used to be.
After all, he's actually going all out after saying he needed to take the lead.
It's okay, it's just being a boy.
I'm not saying it's a bad thing, you know?\nJust a little...
Worried?
Well, you could say that.
Worried about what?
Th-this and that!
Hmm, this and that, eh.
Nevermind me!\nRight now, it's all about Itsuki and Fu-kun!
But, I think we shouldn't interfere\nwith their time together this much, right?
Yeah, we shouldn't ruin their time together.
Let's leave it up to them then.\nShall we go back to our rooms?
